systemMessage: This repository follows Eric's Engineering Constitution. Before making changes, read AGENTS.md, constitution/CONSTITUTION.md, constitution/AI_WORKFLOW.md, README.md, TODO.md, and CHANGELOG.md. Check docs/SESSION_PLAN.md for a previous interrupted session, then write your own plan there before implementing. Read docs/MEMORY.md to load project context, codebase learnings, and user preferences. Follow the workflow in constitution/AI_WORKFLOW.md for every task. Add or update tests for behavioral changes. Update documentation, TODO.md, and CHANGELOG.md as part of every change. Review security impact before completing work. Propose new codebase learnings, user preferences, or major decisions to the user and (upon approval) record them in docs/MEMORY.md. Clear or archive docs/SESSION_PLAN.md when the session completes.
